response.title: Legal Technology Data Analyst
response.description: LexTech Innovations is seeking a Legal Technology Data Analyst to support our mission of integrating advanced technology solutions into the legal industry. In this entry-level role, you will analyze legal data to drive insights, improve processes, and enhance our technology offerings. Ideal candidates will have a blend of legal knowledge, data analysis skills, and a passion for technology.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Law, Data Science, or a related field
